privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real email data from the SpamAssassin Public Corpus, populated into the user's Inbox and Junk folders. The target onboarding folder name is 'Onboarding-Reading', and at least 8 emails must be moved into it. The agent must draft a welcome email to 'alex.chen@techcorp.org' and CC 'dev-team@techcorp.org'. The welcome email subject is checked for any of the keywords: 'welcome', 'onboard', 'reading', 'start', or 'materials' (which contradicts the exact list claimed in the metadata). Finally, the email body must contain at least 20 words.
